title: 〜ほど〜ない
description: The 〜ほど〜ない pattern compares two things and says one is "not as ~ as" the other. The noun before ほど is the standard you fall short of.

content.text: In A ＋ ほど ＋ (adjective) ＋ ない, A is the yardstick and the sentence says the subject does not reach A's level. 東京（とうきょう）ほど大（おお）きくない means "not as big as Tokyo" — Tokyo is the high standard, and the subject falls short of it. The adjective always appears in its negative form.

content.japanese: A ＋ ほど ＋ adjective ＋ ない
この町（まち）は東京（とうきょう）ほど大（おお）きくない。
content.english: This town is not as big as Tokyo.

content.japanese: 韓国（かんこく）は日本（にほん）ほど悪（わる）くない。
content.english: Korea is not as bad as Japan.

content.japanese: 今年（ことし）の夏（なつ）は去年（きょねん）ほど暑（あつ）くない。
content.english: This summer is not as hot as last year.

content.japanese: 私（わたし）は兄（あに）ほど背（せ）が高（たか）くない。
content.english: I am not as tall as my older brother.

content.text: ほど can also follow a verb or a plain clause, often to compare against what you expected. 思（おも）ったほど〜ない means "not as ~ as I thought."

content.japanese: 試験（しけん）は思（おも）ったほど難（むずか）しくなかった。
content.english: The exam was not as difficult as I thought.

content.japanese: この料理（りょうり）は見（み）た目（め）ほど辛（から）くない。
content.english: This dish is not as spicy as it looks.

content.text: The verb or adjective must stay negative — you cannot say 東京（とうきょう）ほど大（おお）きい. To make a plain "as ~ as" positive comparison, use 〜と同（おな）じくらい instead: 大阪（おおさか）と同（おな）じくらい大（おお）きい (as big as Osaka).

examples.japanese: A ＋ ほど ＋ adjective ＋ ない
この町（まち）は東京（とうきょう）ほど大（おお）きくない。
examples.english: This town is not as big as Tokyo.

examples.japanese: 韓国（かんこく）は日本（にほん）ほど悪（わる）くない。
examples.english: Korea is not as bad as Japan.

examples.japanese: 今年（ことし）の夏（なつ）は去年（きょねん）ほど暑（あつ）くない。
examples.english: This summer is not as hot as last year.

examples.japanese: 私（わたし）は兄（あに）ほど背（せ）が高（たか）くない。
examples.english: I am not as tall as my older brother.

examples.japanese: 試験（しけん）は思（おも）ったほど難（むずか）しくなかった。
examples.english: The exam was not as difficult as I thought.

examples.japanese: この料理（りょうり）は見（み）た目（め）ほど辛（から）くない。
examples.english: This dish is not as spicy as it looks.
